'''banubu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:sabayah|sabayah]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-n-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:sabayah|sabayah]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| banubu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bænibith|bænibith]] || [[word:bænibij|bænibij]] || [[word:bænibish|bænibish]] || [[word:bænibi|bænibi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:banunubuth|banunubuth]] || [[word:banunubuj|banunubuj]] || [[word:banunubush|banunubush]] || [[word:banunubu|banunubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:banubuth|banubuth]] || [[word:banubuj|banubuj]] || [[word:banubush|banubush]] || [[word:banubu|banubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:banufbuth|banufbuth]] || [[word:banufbuj|banufbuj]] || [[word:banufbush|banufbush]] || [[word:banufbuf|banufbuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:banubuthu|banubuthu]] || [[word:banubuju|banubuju]] || [[word:banubushu|banubushu]] || [[word:banubuku|banubuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:banubuth|banubuth]] || [[word:banubuj|banubuj]] || [[word:banubush|banubush]] || [[word:banubu|banubu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:banubuthul|banubuthul]] || [[word:banubujul|banubujul]] || [[word:banubushul|banubushul]] || [[word:banubukul|banubukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:banubuthuthu|banubuthuthu]] || [[word:banubujuju|banubujuju]] || [[word:banubushushu|banubushushu]] || [[word:banubuku|banubuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:banubuthun|banubuthun]] || [[word:banubujun|banubujun]] || [[word:banubushun|banubushun]] || [[word:banubukun|banubukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:banubuthuoro|banubuthuoro]] || [[word:banubujuoro|banubujuoro]] || [[word:banubushuoro|banubushuoro]] || [[word:banubukuoro|banubukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
